text.tspan: Both players roll their remaining meeples.
Players take up to of the following actions:
a) reroll any number of meeples
Players pick up all but meeples.
The winner picks up all of their meeples
The loser places 1 meeple on the casualty
track (along with any in the tiezone).
Both players place 1 meeple in the tiezone.
Both players roll their remaining meeples.
Players take up to of the following actions:
a) reroll any number of meeples
Players pick up all but meeples.
The winner picks up all of their meeples
The loser places 1 meeple on the casualty
track (along with any in the tiezone).
Both players place 1 meeple in the tiezone.
